name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to analysis, export, or workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why This Helps

Explain why this would improve the tool for real gameplay editing workflows.

## Constraints

List any important constraints:

- Windows-only or cross-platform
- Must remain local-first
- Must remain non-destructive
- Should be optional/configurable
